titleStmt.title: SII 24.546: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 546. (A.R. No. 11 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of lands valued at 800 poṉ and yielding an annual income of 16 poṉ Maḻavanallūr near Peruṅgāvūr in Kīḻaimuri in Vaḍagarai-Maḻanāḍu by Muddirai Rāmaṉ, son of Aḻagiyaśiṅgar belonging to the group of Śāttāda Vaishṇavas, for certain offerings to be made to god Raṅganātha during the Āḍi festival when the deity halted at karuṅgalluk-kuṟaḍu (stone platform) in Chittira-maṇḍapa built by the donor, and for offerings to Karugula (Karuvūla) Nāchchiyār on the occasion of Jōthi-pūjai during the Mahā-navami festival. The date viz., Śaka 1590, Kīlaka, Makara śu. 13, Sunday, Rōhiṇi corresponds to A.D. 1669, January 3, Sunday, f.d.t. ·95, ·37.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 5 100 6 10 Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa kīlaka ṉāmasam
vatsarattu makaraṉāyattu pūṟuvapakṣattu tiṟiyoteciyum Ātittavarāmum peṟṟa rokaṇi na
ṭcattirattu ṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakulācaṉi vaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷaṉāṭ ṭut tiru
varaṅkar tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅkanātatevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku
śrīvatsagotrattu cāttāta vayiṣṇavarkaḷil Aḻakiya ciṅkar putraṉ muttirai rāmaṉeṉ teṇ
ṭaṉ samaṟpittu poliyūṭṭuc cilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . cittiramaṇṭapa ttil Aṭiye
ṉ Upaiyamāka kaṭṭivitta karuṅkallukkuṟaṭṭil Āṭimātapiṟappu kaṭṭaḷaikku nam perumāḷ Eṟiyaruḷu
kaiyilt tirukkuttumaṇiviḷaBelow the line.kkum tiruvantikkāppukkum ney paṭi 2(1/2)The symbols ‘(1/2)’ and ‘kku’ have been used in this inscription for ‘(1/2)’ and ‘kku’ kku pu 2kku tiṟttattukku Elam pala
m 2 kku pu Ikku tirumañcaṉaccilavu poṉ 1 Amutu ceytaruḷum caṟkaraippoṅkalt taḷikai 2 kku poṉ 2pu4
tocai 100 5 10kku poṉ 2 pu 1 vaṭai 100 5 10kku poṉ 2pu1 Atiracam 100 5 10kku poṉ 4pu2 teṅkāy 10 5 kku pu n=ta
vāḻaippaḻam 7 10 5kku pun=ta Iḷanīr 5 10kku pu 1(1/2) pākkup palam 2 10kkum Ilaiyamutu
5 100kku pu 3 cantaṇappaṭi 10kku pu 3 veḷḷi campātaḷikai 2 kku pu 4 Āka vakaippaṭi pon_10 3pu4
makānavamittiruṉāḷil c coti pūcaikku karukūlaRead karuvūla or karuvukalanācciyār Amutuceytaruḷum Appam 2 10 5 kku poṉ 1pu4
poṅkal taḷikai 1kku poṉ 1 pu2 Āka poṉ 2pu6 Ākapoṉ10 6kku poliyūṭṭu viṭṭatu vaṭakarai maḻai
nāṭṭil kīḻai muṟiyil peruṅkāvūṟku Aṭutta maḻavanallūrila viṭṭa cey 4 kku kāṇuntukamMay be a mistake for kāṇittū
pon_ 8(10)00 kku 10 6 Intappaṭikku poliyūṭṭu cilācāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ perumāḷ śrīraṅkanātate
var śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aṭiyeṉ vayiṣṇa(ṇa)va muttirai rāmaṉeṉ . Intac cilācāsanam Eḻutinamaikku ko
yilk kaṇakku śrīraṅkanāṟāyaṇappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu . Itukkuṇṭāṉa viṭṭavaṉ viḻakkāṭu Aṭiyeṉ puttirapara
mparaiyāka piṟakkaṭaveṉākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.546 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
